headline: Quiet Monday with no meetings or inbound messages — use the open calendar to drive progress on the two active Evals UX tickets before the week fills up.

quick_wins.task: Pick up AE-1079: draft or outline the 'no ground truth' design doc for generated evaluations
quick_wins.why: It's in To Do with Normal priority — moving it to In Progress and getting an initial outline done is <30 min and unblocks deeper design work later this week

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so tomorrow's brief has real data
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Advance AE-744: Justification + Actual vs Expected Evaluation Run results UX for all Evaluators
must_make_progress.why: Major priority, already In Progress — with a completely clear calendar today this is your best deep-work window to push UX specs or mockup reviews forward

must_make_progress.task: Review latest Agents Big Rock OKR page and validate your Evals work aligns with 26.4+ key deliverables
must_make_progress.why: The bi-weekly TR references evals as a key demo area; ensure AE-744 and AE-1079 map to stated deliverables

must_communicate_with.about: Sync on current implementation status of Justification UX and any blockers before you finalize spec updates
Align on 'no ground truth' generated evaluations approach (AE-1079) and any dependencies on Context Engineering or memory work

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix credentials ASAP.
Snowflake metrics unavailable (empty password) — product telemetry and funnel health are invisible.
Neither Jira ticket has a due date set — consider adding target dates to drive urgency and make progress visible to leadership.
No Slack activity in last 16h — unusually quiet; verify Slack integration is functioning correctly.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations resolved or leadership decisions captured today due to data-source outages; restoring Salesforce and Snowflake access is the highest-leverage operational fix.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals UX work (AE-744, AE-1079) directly supports the Agents Big Rock goal of shipping evaluation capabilities in 26.4+; progress today keeps the initiative on track.

slack_summary: Quiet Monday: no meetings, no inbound messages — your calendar is wide open for deep work. Top priorities: push AE-744 (Evals UX for Justification + Actual vs Expected) forward and outline the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079). Also flag: both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, so escalation and metric visibility is zero — get those credentials fixed. Zero meetings today.
